seo.title: Synapse — Finch-AI | Your company's documental brain
seo.description: Finch-AI's Synapse turns scattered documents, emails, contracts and conversations into a living, self-maintaining wiki. Knowledge, decision support, document review and drafting for banks and structured enterprises.
seo.keywords: Synapse, knowledge intelligence, AI company wiki, knowledge graph, AI document management, enterprise AI, on-premise, RAG, verifiable citations, enterprise knowledge management
seo.ldDescription: Finch-AI's Synapse turns scattered documents, emails, contracts and conversations into a living, self-maintaining wiki, with answers cited back to the source.

hero.title: Your company's documental brain
hero.lead: Synapse turns scattered documents, contracts, emails and conversations into a living, self-maintaining wiki. Company knowledge stops scattering: it accumulates, connects, and answers — with every statement cited back to its original source.
hero.chatUser: What SLA are we offering Beta SpA for the Plus product?
hero.chatWarn: I found a discrepancy between the documents.
hero.chatAnswerMid: , but the MSA in the data room reports
hero.chatAnswerPost: . I suggest aligning them before signing.

problemHead.title: Your company knows more than it can remember
problemHead.lead: Every day you produce valuable knowledge. But it scatters across a thousand systems, and when you need it no one can find it.

problems.title: Scattered documents
problems.desc: Contracts on SharePoint, decisions in email, know-how in conversations. Nothing is connected and everything ages in silence.

problems.title: Searches that start from scratch
problems.desc: Every question costs hours: reading the same documents, rebuilding the same context, hoping not to miss a detail.

problems.title: Know-how walks out the door
problems.desc: When a key person leaves, they take years of experience that was never written down anywhere.

howHead.title: From scattered data to knowledge that works for you
howHead.lead: Synapse reads your sources, compiles them into a living documental brain, and produces concrete value — not just answers.

flow.coreCardDesc: AI agents extract entities, connect concepts, detect contradictions and keep everything up to date — with verifiable citations on every statement.

capsHead.title: Four ways Synapse works for you
capsHead.lead: Not a chatbot that answers and forgets. A system that accumulates value every day.

caps.title: Knowledge
caps.desc: Ask in natural language and get precise answers, with every statement cited down to the exact line of the original source.
items: Semantic search across the whole archive

caps.title: Decision support
caps.desc: Synapse compares documents, detects contradictions and inconsistencies, flags risks and gives you the full picture before you decide.
items: Proactive alerts on deadlines and risks

caps.title: Document review
caps.desc: Upload a contract, a proposal, a due-diligence dossier: Synapse analyzes it against your policies and standards, and highlights what matters.
items: Gap analysis against regulations and policies

caps.title: Document drafting
caps.desc: Generate drafts of reports, summaries, replies and proposals already grounded in your company knowledge — ready to review, not to write from scratch.
items: Reports and summaries with built-in sources
Drafts consistent with your company style

sourcesHead.title: It connects where your knowledge already lives
sourcesHead.lead: No migration. Synapse reads your sources where they are — even behind the company firewall.

enterprise.title: Your data never leaves your perimeter
enterprise.text: Synapse is built for banks, insurers, healthcare and the public sector. It runs behind your firewall, with your models, under your control. Compliance is not an option, but a foundation.

feats.fd: Deploy in your cloud or data center
Permissions down to a single page

deployHead.title: From cloud to air-gapped, one platform
deployHead.lead: Choose the model that fits your compliance constraints, with no compromise on features.

cta.title: Turn your knowledge into a competitive advantage
cta.text: See in a personalized demo how Synapse can give a voice to your company's documents. Let's talk about your specific use case.
